Agent.Name: UManager

Variable.Help: Enter your Push Token from U-Manager Settings → Notifications.
Specify the fields included in the notification title.
Specify the fields included in the notification body.

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############
if [ -z "$UMANAGER_TOKEN" ]; then logger -t "UManager" "Error: UMANAGER_TOKEN is not set. Configure it in Notification Settings." exit 1 fi
PUSHURL="https://u-manager-push-worker.jandrop.workers.dev/webhook/$UMANAGER_TOKEN" IMPORTANCE="${IMPORTANCE:-normal}"
json_escape() { local s="${1//\\/\\\\}" s="${s//\"/\\\"}" printf '%s' "$s" }
ESC_TITLE=$(json_escape "$UMANAGER_TITLE") ESC_MESSAGE=$(json_escape "$UMANAGER_MESSAGE") ESC_TIMESTAMP=$(json_escape "$TIMESTAMP") ESC_LINK=$(json_escape "$LINK")
JSON_PAYLOAD=$(printf '{"title":"%s","message":"%s","importance":"%s","timestamp":"%s","link":"%s"}' \ "$ESC_TITLE" "$ESC_MESSAGE" "$IMPORTANCE" "$ESC_TIMESTAMP" "$ESC_LINK")
curl -s -m 10 -X POST "$PUSHURL" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8" \ -d "$JSON_PAYLOAD" > /dev/null 2>&1
